name: Lawrence Ferlinghetti
abstract: Lawrence Monsanto Ferlinghetti (né Ferling; March 24, 1919 – February 22, 2021) was an American poet, painter, social activist, and co-founder of City Lights Booksellers & Publishers. An author of poetry, translations, fiction, theatre, art criticism, and film narration, Ferlinghetti was best known for his second collection of poems, A C…

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Lloyd
about_quotes.evidence: And Ferlinghetti and I would tour and do college dates and stuff like that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Charles Lloyd — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
